how.step3: Connect a channel — your agent is live

items.q: Do I need technical skills to use it?
items.a: No. Create an agent in a few clicks, upload your data, and connect a channel.

items.q: How are AI token costs handled?
items.a: You bring your own OpenRouter key, and token costs are billed directly to your account. Vigent only charges for the platform.
Telegram, WhatsApp, Instagram, Rubika, Bale and a web widget — all in one dashboard.

items.q: Can I try it for free?
items.a: Yes — a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

cta.title: Build your smart agent today
cta.note: No credit card required — just your phone number
